reviews.review_title: Early days, but excited for the future!
reviews.review_description:
Very early access of course, but I’m already intrigued about the procedural building generation (that part doesn’t form part of the main game yet, but has lots of possibilities for later!).

Lots of potential for something really original to come out of this. 5 stars to support the dev for the future of this game!
I know it’s early access but I was hoping i could move around or something. Its kind of like fruit ninja. Dull
